category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Qatar.

title.en: China-to-Uganda EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入乌干达：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入烏干達：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Uganda UNBS PVoC import conformity controls, ERA electricity-sector and installation-permit requirements, Uganda 240/415 V 50 Hz grid conditions, IEC 61851 safety, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector expectations, IEC 61000 EMC evidence, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与乌干达UNBS PVoC进口合格评定控制、ERA电力行业及安装许可要求、乌干达240/415 V 50 Hz电网条件、IEC 61851安全、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口预期、IEC 61000 EMC证据，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930基线的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與烏干達UNBS PVoC進口合格評定控制、ERA電力行業及安裝許可要求、烏干達240/415 V 50 Hz電網條件、IEC 61851安全、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口預期、IEC 61000 EMC證據，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930基線的差距對照。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Uganda, the practical gaps are UNBS PVoC pre-export conformity evidence and Certificate of Conformity planning, ERA and utility coordination for grid-connected installations, Uganda 240 V single-phase / 415 V three-phase 50 Hz input-range confirmation, IEC 61851 safety evidence, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector hardware where the project follows the international IEC direction, and IEC 61000 EMC documentation. A China GB/T-only charger is not connector-ready for Uganda IEC 62196 deployments: GB/T 20234 couplers are physically and electrically incompatible with Type 2 / CCS2, and GB/T 27930 DC communication does not substitute for CCS2 communication or network back-office requirements. Uganda has visible local e-mobility activity, including electric buses and two/three-wheeler charging or swapping pilots, but public charging infrastructure is still early; exporters should verify the current UNBS PVoC route, HS code, charger type, ERA or utility requirements, and site approval path before shipment.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入乌干达时，实务差距包括：UNBS PVoC装运前合格评定证据和合格证书规划；并网安装需与ERA及电力公司协调；确认乌干达240 V单相 / 415 V三相、50 Hz输入范围；提供IEC 61851安全证据；在项目采用IEC国际方向时，将接口硬件改为IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2；并准备IEC 61000 EMC文件。仅支持中国GB/T的充电桩不适用于乌干达IEC 62196部署：GB/T 20234耦合器与Type 2 / CCS2在物理和电气层面不兼容，GB/T 27930直流通信也不能替代CCS2通信或联网后台要求。乌干达已有电动公交和两/三轮车充电或换电等本地电动出行活动，但公共充电基础设施仍处于早期阶段；出口商应在出货前核实现行UNBS PVoC路径、HS编码、充电桩类型、ERA或电力公司要求和场站审批路径。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入烏干達時，實務差距包括：UNBS PVoC裝運前合格評定證據和合格證書規劃；併網安裝需與ERA及電力公司協調；確認烏干達240 V單相 / 415 V三相、50 Hz輸入範圍；提供IEC 61851安全證據；在項目採用IEC國際方向時，將接口硬體改為IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2；並準備IEC 61000 EMC文件。僅支持中國GB/T的充電樁不適用於烏干達IEC 62196部署：GB/T 20234耦合器與Type 2 / CCS2在物理和電氣層面不兼容，GB/T 27930直流通訊也不能替代CCS2通訊或聯網後台要求。烏干達已有電動公交和兩/三輪車充電或換電等本地電動出行活動，但公共充電基礎設施仍處於早期階段；出口商應在出貨前核驗現行UNBS PVoC路徑、HS編碼、充電樁類型、ERA或電力公司要求和場站審批路徑。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, UNBS PVoC scope determination, ERA approval, UMEME or UEDCL grid-connection approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, network operators, and installers should verify current Uganda conformity assessment rules, PVoC documentation, ERA installation-permit requirements, IEC standard editions, and utility connection rules with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、UNBS PVoC适用范围裁定、ERA批准、UMEME或UEDCL并网批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、网络运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行乌干达合格评定规则、PVoC文件、ERA安装许可要求、IEC标准版本及电力公司接入规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、UNBS PVoC適用範圍裁定、ERA批准、UMEME或UEDCL併網批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、網絡運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行烏干達合格評定規則、PVoC文件、ERA安裝許可要求、IEC標準版本及電力公司接入規則。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
